goal: Найти один или несколько ортогональных specialist-сигналов или conditioning-слоёв, которые работают там, где база active-signal-v1@1 не торгует, и доказанно приносят новые входы, а не скрытый дубляж.
global_constraints: База active-signal-v1@1 immutable — не ретюнить, не менять пороги, часы, дни, исполнение.
Сырые event-entry конструкции (один event + один фильтр) запрещены — H1/H2 тупик.
Каждый кандидат сначала проходит complement-first режим: вход только на base_absent anchor-барах.
Single-filter entry запрещён — минимум три логических слоя (новый слой + подтверждение режима + ограничитель плотности).
Model-first запрещён до завершения Wave A (low-friction).
Кандидат отклоняется, если strict additive слабый, а permissive сильный — признак скрытого каннибализма.

stages.title: Постмортем plan_v1 и фиксация новых правил
stages.objective: Record a structured postmortem of plan_v1 and fix immutable v2 rules so the agent does not repeat the same failure under a different name.
actions: Open a new research_project for the v2 cycle.

Record plan_v1 postmortem in research_record: H1/H2 died from weak selectivity and commissions; H3–H5 were infrastructure-blocked; core failure was weak candidate architecture, not just wrong families.
Fix v2 invariants: base immutable, no raw H1/H2 retry, complement-first for all candidates, single-filter entry forbidden, model-first forbidden until low-friction wave completes.
Create allowed v2 branch list: IV dynamics, event×state interactions, classifier-transition specialists, cross-symbol leadership (after data readiness), model-backed routing (late wave only).
Initialize research_map with atlas structure for v2.
success_criteria: Explicit postmortem recorded and agent understands v2 is a different class of research, not a retry of raw ideas.

stages.title: Построение base-absent research surface
stages.objective: Build an anchor-level table mapping where the base trades and where it is absent, then characterize the base_absent surface to find directional sub-spaces.
actions: Run experiment to build anchor-level table: every 1h anchor, base long/short decision, available features, subsequent window outcome for long and short.
Label each anchor as base_long_fired, base_short_fired, or base_absent.
On base_absent subset build feature map: hour, dow, cl_1h, cl_4h, cl_1d, rsi, iv_est, event distances, weak-quarter and weak-month clusters.
Find sub-spaces where base is absent but market shows directional tendency.
Partition sub-spaces into candidate long specialists, candidate short specialists, and unclear/noisy zones.
Record findings in research_record and update research_map.
success_criteria: Map of missing regimes exists specifically on the surface where the base is absent.

stages.title: Wave A — low-friction новые слои на уже доступных данных
stages.objective: Select hypothesis families that can be built without heavy external infrastructure, using already available 1h data and minimal new custom features.
actions: For each family (A1: IV dynamics, A2: Event×state, A3: Classifier-transition, A4: Compression-to-release) write hypothesis contract: missing regime, why not a duplicate of base, why it should work on base_absent surface.
Check features_catalog for available 1h features per family.
Identify which features need custom publication for A1 and A2.
Verify existing features for A3 and A4, flag gaps.
Select maximum 6–8 hypothesis prototypes total.
Record all hypotheses in research_record and research_map.
success_criteria: Small high-quality list of Wave A hypotheses exists, all data-ready or nearly data-ready.

stages.title: Feature contract и публикация custom features для wave A
stages.objective: Translate hypothesis ideas into correct causal features with explicit contracts, then validate, publish, and materialize them.
actions: For each new feature fix contract: source, causal availability at decision time, lookback, warm-up behavior, human-readable interpretation.
IV dynamics features: IV change 1h, IV change 3–6h, IV acceleration, IV reversal, IV stretch vs recent mean/median, IV stretch × classifier state.
Classifier transition features: state change between adjacent windows.
Compression-release features: past-only compression indicators.
For each custom feature: features_custom validate, features_custom publish, rebuild materialized dataset via features_dataset, then features_dataset inspect.
Record each feature contract in research_record.
success_criteria: All Wave A features published, causality-checked, and materialized successfully.

stages.title: Hypothesis plausibility на base-absent surface
stages.objective: Perform early triage of prototypes on the complement surface only, discarding those that show no structured effect where the base is absent.
actions: For each prototype check profitability and slice behavior only on base_absent subset using features_analytics.
Evaluate sample size, stability across hours and dow, whether effect is limited to one extreme bucket.
Look for structure, not a single nice tail.
Immediately reject candidates that: produce noise, are too broad, do not reduce the space to a meaningful specialist regime.
Record all rejections with reasons in research_record.
success_criteria: Only plausibility-approved prototypes remain, with visible structure specifically where the base is absent.

stages.title: Построение strict specialist prototypes
stages.objective: Convert surviving ideas into real signal prototypes with at least three logical layers, avoiding the H1/H2 trap of weak single-filter entries.
actions: For each candidate build 2–4 strict prototypes, each with minimum 3 logical layers: new layer + regime confirmation + density limiter.
No wide parameter sweeps allowed.
For each prototype record in advance: expected specialist regime, why additive by construction, expected trade density, why it should not cannibalize the base.
If a prototype produces hundreds of weak entries, reject it immediately — do not tune.
Record all prototypes and their architecture in research_record.
success_criteria: Small set of strict specialist prototypes exists, not a loose grid of weak filters.

stages.title: Complement-first standalone backtests
stages.objective: Run standalone backtests in complement-only mode first to verify each prototype has independent value on the space where the base does not trade.
actions: Run standalone backtest in complement-only mode: signal may only enter on base_absent anchor bars.
After complement-only, run full standalone for overall behavior context.
Record for each prototype: net PnL, trades, PF, DD, PnL per trade, profit concentration in top N trades, quarterly profile.
Flag if H1/H2 pattern repeats: too many trades, PF near 1.0, fees kill the idea.
Save all run results and record verdicts in research_record.
success_criteria: Shortlist of prototypes that look like real specialist candidates even on complement-only mode.

stages.title: Stability, concentration и specialist verification
stages.objective: Retain only prototypes that work as genuine specialist layers across windows, not those living on a single lucky historical slice.
actions: Run window stability analysis on each complement-approved prototype.
Run condition stability on key conditions via backtests_conditions.
Identify weak and strong windows.
Check whether all profit comes from a single quarter or a single anomalous move.
For specialist-type candidates prove: which regime it fixes, and that this regime was genuinely weak or empty for the base.
Record all stability findings in research_record.
success_criteria: Only stable specialists or honestly limited but reproducible regime-repair layers remain.

stages.title: Интеграция с базой в двух режимах
stages.objective: Test each finalist in both strict additive and permissive integration modes against the unchanged base to determine genuine additivity vs hidden overlap.
actions: Run strict additive integration: candidate forbidden on any anchor where base already entered.
Run permissive integration: normal integration without hard exclusion.
Compare both modes against the unchanged base alone.
Record: delta PnL, delta trades, delta PF, delta DD, weak-quarter repair, strict vs permissive difference.
Interpret: strict additive good → strong orthogonality; strict weak but permissive strong → hidden overlap risk; both weak → reject.
success_criteria: Clear picture of who is genuinely additive vs who looks good only by mixing with the base.

stages.title: Cannibalization, ownership и new-entry proof
stages.objective: Formally prove that each integration candidate brings genuinely new trades and new profit, not cannibalized base entries.
actions: For each integration candidate compute: overlap with base, number of truly new trades, base trades displaced, PnL of new trades only, profit ownership, coverage expansion (hours, states, event sub-spaces now covered).
Use signal_ownership analysis to confirm the new layer carries profit itself.

Apply hard rejection rules: reject if overlap is high and strict additive is weak; reject if new-trade PnL is small; reject if ownership shows candidate is not the profit carrier; reject if layer mainly intercepts good base trades.
Record all cannibalism findings in research_record.
success_criteria: Direct proof exists for which candidates genuinely expand the system.

stages.title: Wave B — medium-friction branch
stages.objective: Explore cross-symbol leadership, model-backed compression/routing, and event-state-model hybrids only if Wave A failed to produce conclusive candidates.
actions: Evaluate data readiness for B1 (cross-symbol leadership): ETHUSDT 1h dataset and cross-symbol custom features.
Evaluate infrastructure readiness for B2 (model-backed): models_dataset contract, models_train, models_to_feature pipeline.
B3 (event-state-model hybrids) only after B1/B2 progress.
For each branch that is data-ready, follow the same pipeline as Wave A: hypothesis contract → feature publication → plausibility → prototype → complement standalone → stability → integration.
Record all Wave B progress in research_record and research_map.
success_criteria: Wave B branches evaluated for readiness; started branches follow the same strict specialist pipeline.
stages.gate_hint: Wave A must be inconclusive (no candidate passed cannibalization proof) before starting Wave B. If Wave A produced accepted candidates, skip this stage and go directly to walk-forward.

stages.title: Walk-forward и финальный отбор
stages.objective: Run walk-forward validation on all surviving candidates and produce a final honest verdict on whether a new additive layer was found.
actions: Run walk-forward evaluation on every candidate that passed integration and cannibalism proof.
Compare walk-forward results against the base alone: final uplift, DD quality, new-entry proof persistence.
For accepted candidates, finalize snapshot via backtests_strategy.
Write final research report with honest answer: was a new additive layer found or not.

Complete the operational checklist: base never changed, no raw H1/H2 retry, base-absent surface built, all hypotheses genuinely new, complement-first verified, strict+permissive integration done, rejection journal filled, cannibalism journal filled, final report written.
Record final verdict and all artifacts in research_record.
success_criteria: Walk-forward completed for all finalists, honest final verdict recorded, operational checklist fully signed off.

warnings: plan_v2 is fundamentally different from plan_v1: complement-first architecture, not raw hypothesis sweeps.
Wave B (stage_11) is gated on Wave A being inconclusive — do not start without explicit gate evaluation.
All objectives and tool_hints are in Russian source context but translated to English in this draft for agent consumption.
